We are on Rocky Linux 10.

The finding description: The Storage option in [Coredump] section of /etc/systemd/coredump.conf or a drop-in file in /etc/systemd/coredump.conf.d/*.conf can be set to none to disable storing core dumps permanently.

We must set Storage=none in the relevant configuration file.

We note that the rule expects the setting in either:
  - /etc/systemd/coredump.conf
